hero.badge: Doctor-Led Fat Freezing in Kuala Lumpur
hero.description: Some fat just refuses to move. Target those "last mile" fat areas without surgery. Natural-looking results with minimal downtime.
hero.trustNote: *Results may vary. Consultation required for suitability.

whatIs.description: It uses controlled cold to target fat cells under the skin. Fat cells are more sensitive to cold than skin, so the aim is to damage fat cells while keeping the skin safe.
whatIs.stat2Desc: Body clears fat cells over weeks

canDo.can1: Lower belly pouch that stays after dieting
canDo.can2: Love handles that don't tone up
canDo.cannot2: Treat obesity as a primary solution
canDo.cannot3: Fix major loose skin by itself

journey.step1Desc: We map the area, pick the right applicator, and guide you through realistic results.
journey.step2Desc: Applicator placement with controlled cooling. Most feel numbness after a few minutes.
journey.step3Desc: Return to normal activity same day. Results visible in 4-12 weeks.

results.description: Fat freezing is not instant. It is gradual. Here's what to expect:

pricing.priceNote: *Prices are estimates. Final quote after consultation.

faq.a1: Yes, for the right person and fat type. Clinical research reports 20-25% reduction in fat layer thickness in treated areas.
faq.a2: Most feel cold and suction at start, then numbness. Afterward, tingling or sensitivity. Generally well-tolerated.
faq.q3: How many sessions do I need?
faq.a3: Many see changes after 1 session, but 2-3 sessions are often recommended depending on your goals.
faq.a4: Treated fat cells are reduced long-term. But if you gain weight, remaining cells can expand.
faq.a5: Paradoxical Adipose Hyperplasia (PAH) is rare but possible. We discuss all risks during consultation.

cta.title: Ready to slim a stubborn area?
cta.description: If you're tired of fighting the same pocket of fat, fat freezing may be your next smart move. Safe screening, clear expectations, natural-looking results.
cta.note: *Doctor-led screening ensures you're a suitable candidate
